title: Long Acres Farm
homeDescription:
**Welcome to Long Acres Farm**, a family-owned farm located in Snohomish, WA. Established in February 2013, our farm began with a small flock of a dozen chickens and a passion for raising goats. In 2015, we welcomed our first three Nigerian Dwarf bottle babies, marking the beginning of our journey. Initially, our goal was to use goats for brush clearing, but it quickly became a family affair. All three of our children joined 4-H to learn proper husbandry and showmanship, and we soon discovered an incredible community.

As a family, we became deeply involved, with my children and I entering the show ring, while my wife expertly managed the behind-the-scenes operations, including clipping and paperwork. By 2016, our focus had evolved, and we became committed to expanding our knowledge of goat farming. Through extensive research, we invested in high-quality breeding stock from exceptional milk and conformation lines.

Our mission is to breed top-tier, ADGA-registered goats that are both show-quality and productive dairy animals. As an ADGA Plus herd, we actively participate in DHIR (Dairy Herd Improvement Registry) and Annual Linear Appraisals. We pride ourselves on maintaining a clean herd, conducting annual tests for CAE, CL, Brucella, and Johnes to ensure the health and well being of our animals.

Whether you’re seeking a show-quality goat, a productive dairy goat, or simply a companion for your family or farm, we are here to assist. We invite you to explore our site and reach out to us with any questions. Whether you’re local or across the country, we would be delighted to discuss your needs and help you find the perfect goat for your farm.
saleTerms:
## Doeling/Buckling Kid price determined as follows*:

* Base price                    $350
* Bred to *B Buck           +$50
* Grand Champion Win  +$50  (each additional leg $75)
* Superior Genetics +$50
* E in mammary on LA   +$50
* LA Score 88 & above   +$50
* AR Milk Production Star adds $50 (ST Milk Production Star adds $25)  
* Daughters that show well add value for the dam.
* Proven sires add value.
* $25  Discount given to DHIR, LA, or ADGA Show homes
Bucks will not be available out of first fresheners. Buck kids will only be sold as bucks if we would use them in our breeding program.

## Weathers $175.00* Add $25 for Blue eyes

Discounts maybe given for multiples

*Note – on occasion, if we feel the above pricing schedule does not adequately account for the value of specific pairings, adjustments will be made. When you buy breed stock from us we request first right of refusal if breed stock is ever sold.
